vocab.meaning: niềm tin của người tiêu dùng
vocab.example: High-resolution photos and 360-degree views definitely bolster consumer confidence when purchasing high-end footwear online.

vocab.meaning: chỉ bằng một phần nhỏ chi phí (rẻ hơn nhiều)
vocab.example: By utilizing online discount codes, I managed to buy a pair of running shoes for a fraction of the cost in physical retail stores.
I only shop on reputable websites that feature a secure payment gateway to protect my sensitive financial data.

vocab.meaning: được làm riêng/thiết kế riêng (tùy chỉnh)
vocab.example: Some specialized websites allow you to order tailor-made insoles by simply uploading a scan of your foot profile.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống hạ tầng logistics/giao nhận
vocab.example: Thanks to an improved logistics infrastructure, I can now receive my overseas shoe orders in less than a week.

vocab.meaning: lời chứng thực/đánh giá từ khách hàng
vocab.example: I always pore over customer testimonials to determine if the leather quality of the boots matches the advertised description.

vocab.meaning: sự sai lệch/khác biệt về kích cỡ
vocab.example: One of the major pitfalls of e-commerce is dealing with size discrepancies between different international shoe brands.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra (ảnh thật khách chụp)
vocab.example: I find user-generated content much more reliable than professional studio shots when trying to see the actual color of the shoes.

vocab.meaning: một đợt mua sắm thả ga/xả láng
vocab.example: Whenever there is a seasonal clearance, I tend to go on an online shopping spree and stock up on formal footwear.
I opted for expedited shipping because I needed those specific heels for a wedding gala the following weekend.
